name: PixArt Imaging Inc.
summary: PixArt Imaging Inc. researches, designs, produces, and sells CMOS image sensors and related ICs in Taiwan, Hong Kong, China, Japan, and internationally. The company offers optical mouse sensor, optical track sensor, and finger navigation products; and multiple object tracking, optical motion tracking, gesture recognition, and ambient light and proximity sensing products, as well as CMOS camera SOC products. It also provides photoplethysmography sensors, computer vision, capacitive touch products, and customized ASIC sensors; wireless audio SOC/true wireless stereo IC products; Bluetooth low energy products; and RF chips. The company's products are used in computers and peripherals, smart homes, offices and classrooms, wearables and hearables, gaming controllers, automotive, surveillance and cameras, commercial and others, automation navigation, and health management. It is also involved in the investment and technical support activities. PixArt Imaging Inc. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
